attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,         
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.REASON_DESC_END_CUST  ,        
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   ,       
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,      
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.REASON_DESCR,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
  WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_REP_NUM ,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACC_SHRD_SPLIT WI_SHRD_SPLIT
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT_ROUND_OFF WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF
 WHERE WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND COALESCE( WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)= COALESCE( WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)
 AND COALESCE( WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999)= COALESCE( WI_SHRD_SPLIT.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999)
 AND COALESCE( WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)= COALESCE( WI_SHRD_SPLIT.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)
 AND COALESCE( WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)= COALESCE( WI_SHRD_SPLIT.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)
 )

SELECT 
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,  
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.REASON_DESCR,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF APRIL CD*/
  WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.SALES_REP_NUM ,
WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF.PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
NULL AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT_ROUND_OFF WI_DRR_ROUND_OFF
 WHERE (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN 
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT_ROUND_OFF GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING ROUND(SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT))=100)

SELECT 
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_DRR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 WI_DRR.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
 -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 -999 AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR, 
 100 AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
     WI_DRR.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_DRR.SALES_REP_NUM,
WI_DRR.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_DRR.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_DRR.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE NA_PROCESSED_FLG='N') WI_DRR /*WHERE (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) NOT IN
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_SALES_ACNT_MEASURE_FNL) ) WI_DRR*/ 
 INNER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT) AS SUM_SPLT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT
 WHERE  (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN 
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3)
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 )SPLIT
 ON  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND  WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
 ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('NA_SPLT_PCT')
 WHERE  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY=-999 AND DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY=-999

SELECT 
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_DRR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,         
 WI_DRR.REASON_DESC_END_CUST  ,        
 WI_DRR.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   ,       
 WI_DRR.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,      
 WI_DRR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
 ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR, /*Reason Description Changed here*/
 CAST((CAST(WI_DRR.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT AS DECIMAL(9,6))/CAST(SPLIT.SUM_SPLT AS DECIMAL(11,6)))*100 AS DECIMAL(8,5))  AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF APRIL CD*/
   WI_DRR.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_DRR.SALES_REP_NUM ,
WI_DRR.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_DRR.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_DRR.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE NA_PROCESSED_FLG='N') WI_DRR/*(BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) NOT IN
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_SALES_ACNT_MEASURE_FNL) */
 INNER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT) AS SUM_SPLT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT
 WHERE  (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN 
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT 
 WHERE  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY<>-999 GROUP BY 1,2,3)
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 )SPLIT
 ON  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND  WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
 ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('NA_SPLT_PCT')

SELECT 
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_DRR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,         
 WI_DRR.REASON_DESC_END_CUST  ,        
 WI_DRR.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   ,       
 WI_DRR.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,      
WI_DRR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
 ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR, 
 CAST((CAST(WI_DRR.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT AS DECIMAL(9,6))/CAST(SPLIT.SUM_SPLT AS DECIMAL(11,6)))*100 AS DECIMAL(8,5))  AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   WI_DRR.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_DRR.SALES_REP_NUM,
WI_DRR.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_DRR.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_DRR.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE NA_PROCESSED_FLG='N') WI_DRR /*WHERE (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) NOT IN
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_SALES_ACNT_MEASURE_FNL)) WI_DRR*/
  INNER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT) AS SUM_SPLT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT
 WHERE  (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN 
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3)
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 )SPLIT
 ON  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND  WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND  WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
 ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('NA_SPLT_PCT')
 WHERE  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY=-999 AND DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY<>-999

SELECT
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,         
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.REASON_DESC_END_CUST  ,        
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT   ,       
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,      
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.REASON_DESCR,
 CASE WHEN SPLIT_LOGIC.SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT <100 THEN WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT + SPLIT_LOGIC.SPLIT_PERCENT_ADD
 ELSE CASE WHEN SPLIT_LOGIC.SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT >100 THEN WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT - SPLIT_LOGIC.SPLIT_PERCENT_SUB
 END END AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF APRIL CD*/
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_REP_NUM ,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_SHRD_SPLIT.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACC_SHRD_SPLIT WI_SHRD_SPLIT
 INNER JOIN
 (
 SELECT
 SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT,
 SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT - 100 AS SPLIT_PERCENT_SUB,
 100 - SPLIT_LOGIC_IN.SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT  AS SPLIT_PERCENT_ADD
 FROM 
 (SELECT 
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,         
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ,        
 BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT) AS SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACC_SHRD_SPLIT
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 HAVING SUM_SPLIT_PERCENT <>100
 )SPLIT_LOGIC_IN
 )SPLIT_LOGIC
 ON SPLIT_LOGIC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND SPLIT_LOGIC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND SPLIT_LOGIC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,WI_SHRD_SPLIT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ORDER BY  WI_SHRD_SPLIT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,WI_SHRD_SPLIT.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT ASC) = 1
